SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROCK AND ROSE LANDSCAPING & BIRKMYER ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMMONS, TRACY SIMMONS, MICHAEL $4,736.72 PRINCIPAL, $350.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,086.72 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
